boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the public-sector operator execute the citizen-record or casework action now? Focus: records disclosure to representative.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Open dependency blocks execution until matched.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current authorization and representative identity match remains open

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The control record does not close the exact records-disclosure boundary, and the required dependency on current authorization plus representative identity match remains unresolved. Source policy requires exact boundary closure before execution, so the correct disposition is escalate and hold pending resolution.
open_blockers: current authorization and representative identity match
